ThingDef.label: Darkstar Crystal
ThingDef.description:
A secure container holding an incredibly rare and equally dangerous crystal mined from the edges of the Dead Zones at the Galactic Core.

A single careless cut from such a crystal can "shut down" biological or electro-mechanical functions of any being leading to instant death. Wars have been waged over a single such crystal, and many traders are willing to pay very high prices for them.

This is an essential component in the creation of Darkstar Weapons.
